prompt: In a target repo, shape card INV-21 for adding CSV export to an existing invoice list. Requirement is clear, size M, canonical verification is `make test`, workspace is `dir:/work/invoice-app`, and unrelated invoice creation must not change. Return proposed artifact paths and concise contents for every artifact needed for a build-ready handoff to ginb. Do not write code.
assertions: Does not create a spec or ADR without decision value
Brief owns objective, bounded scope, non-goals, and observable acceptance
Plan contains ordered targets, changes, verification evidence, and requirement traceability
Kanban card stays thin and records dir:/work/invoice-app plus artifact links
